prompt: A hand-drawn style city food map with Chengdu as the theme. The image is based on a bird's-eye view simplified hand-drawn city map, marking major roads and landmarks with a cute, non-proportional hand-drawn feel. Scattered across the map are 12 exquisite small hand-drawn illustrations of food spots: Chunxi Road Chuan Chuan Xiang (skewers with various ingredients steaming), Kuanzhai Alley San Da Pao (three glutinous rice balls flying towards a copper plate), Jianshe Road Egg Pancakes (golden and crispy being flipped), Yulin Road Hotpot (nine-grid pot bubbling), etc. Each illustration occupies about 5% of the map area, with the shop name and a recommendation quote "The place with a queue at 2 AM" marked in handwriting next to it. The edges of the map are decorated with hand-drawn vines and chili peppers forming a border. There is a hand-drawn compass and legend in the bottom right corner. The top left title "Chengdu Foodie Trek Map" uses chubby, rounded hand-drawn artistic fonts decorated with chili peppers. The overall style is a hand-drawn texture of mixed watercolor and colored pencils, with colors dominated by warm tones (chili red, ginger yellow, emerald green), 1:1 ratio.
